description: Leftover fake data from earlier Exa work: a chapelboro.com news headline promoted into a finding + org (name = headline, domain = chapelboro.com). finding ef3a51f9, discovery_record ef231ab1, org 7b692c36. Hard-destroy was blocked by the safeguard pending explicit user OK; alternatively reject/suppress via the review queue. Needs user go-ahead before deleting.
title: Delete Morinaga junk finding/org (chapelboro.com news artifact)
